entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Explains how pricing structure connects to sales conversations and buyer constraints

entities.name: Sales-conversation framing
entities.context: Framework for understanding how salespeople should interpret buyer statements and map them to packages

entities.name: The pricing triangle
entities.context: Structural framework that defines constraints salespeople must respect when shaping offers

entities.name: Pricing structure
entities.context: Background system designed to make it easy for sales to ask key questions and avoid margin-damaging combinations

relationships.context: Ilya ties structural pricing choices back to what salespeople actually hear from customers
Ilya references the triangle as the framework salespeople should respect when shaping offers
The framing helps salespeople understand which constraints matter and shape offers that respect the triangle
The pricing structure is designed to make sales-conversation framing easy in practice
